name: Fleshbound Ritual
text:
{key:effect}

name: Worm Wood
text:
{key:instant}

name: Churn

text:
{key:instant}

text:
{key:instant}
{trigger:cast} Choose up to 3 open zones on either side of the grid. Create a Celestial {force:2} token in each, then sacrifice them until 1 remains.

name: Ghost Gathering

skill: {skill:spawn} Sacrifice all Ghost tokens in play: create a Ghost {force:?}/{key:bleed} token with {force:?} equal to the number of cards sacrificed.

name: Particle Cannon
skill:
{key:Effect}
{skill:Evaporate} Destroy the opposing front row card. Effected card takes 2 damage.

text:
{key:instant}

name: Blood Rage
text:
{key:instant}

name: Sprint
text: {trigger:enter} Target unit gains {key:quick}.

name: Kick The Hive
text: {trigger:cast} Sacrifice a Bug you control: set a unit from your hand. If the set unit's LVL is greater than 3, its {key:delayed}.

name: False Power
text:
{key:Effect}
Effected card's {force:?} is equal to the {force:?} of the card they currently oppose. If there is no opposing card, they are {force:0}.

name: Quick Play
text: You may play Units at {key:instant} speed.

name: Doomsday Barrel
text: {trigger:cast} Remove 4 nuclear counters from Doomsday Barrel: Deal 4 damage to any target.
skill: {skill:ready for doom} Add 2 nuclear counters to Doomsday Barrel.

name: Prophecy of Plague
text:
All units enter with {key:sick}.
{trigger:perish} Destroy all {key:sick} cards in play.
{trigger:cast} Destroy a {key:sick} card in play.

name: Pin Cushion
text:
Whenever you take non-combat damage, deal damage to an opponent equal to the damage taken.
{trigger:cast} Deal 1 damage to a front row unit in play.

name: Avid Collector
text: {trigger:cast} Sacrifice any number of tokens you control: draw cards equal to the number of tokens sacrificed.

name: Boil
text: {trigger:cast} Target unit and any adjacent units take 1 damage.

name: Dying Star
text:
{trigger:cast} Void Dying Star.
{trigger:begin} If Dying Star is in your void, deal 1 damage to any target.

name: Sacrificial Knife
text:
Draw a card whenever an opponent sacrifices a card.
{trigger:cast} Destroy target card. The owner of the card draws a card.

name: Grave Digger
text: {trigger:cast} Shuffle your discard pile, then draw up to 2 cards from it.

name: Reap The Dead
text:
{key:instant}
{trigger:cast} Set a unit from your discard, then take damage equal to it's LVL.

name: The Cure?
text:
{key:instant}
{trigger:cast} Choose a player. Cards that player controls gain {key:sick}.

name: Rock Throw
text:
When a Golem enters your discard, target unit you control gains {force:1}.
{trigger:cast} You may discard any number of Golems in your hand or void any number of Golems in your discard. For each card discarded/voided this way, deal 3 damage to a target card or draw a card.

name: Unstasis
text:
{key:effect}
The effects of {key:static} are nullified for the effected card.

text:
{key:instant}

text:

name: Dissolve
Sea Sick
text:
{key:instant}

name: Melt
text:
{key:instant}
{trigger:cast} Discard your hand. Draw an additional card during your next 2 draw phases.

name: Transmogriphy
skill: {skill:Something New} Sacrifice a card you control: set the top card of your deck.

name: Reconstruction
skill:
{key:instant}
{skill:repurpose} Sacrifice a card you control: search your deck for a Golem or Structure. Reveal it, then add it to your hand.

name: Elder Spell
text:
{key:instant}
{trigger:cast} Return all spells to their owner's hands. All cards in play take damage equal to half of their {force:?}, rounded down. All players draw a card.

text:
{key:instant}
{trigger:cast} Up to 3 target units gain {key:sick}. If 3 cards were targetted by It Gets Worse, draw a card.
skill: {skill:sickening} {key:sick} cards your opponent controls take an instance of sick damage.

name: Madness Policy
text: {trigger:enter} Any card that opposes another card is sacrificed. Add a soul counter to Madness Policy for every card sacrificed.
skill: {skill:smile} If Madness Policy has a soul counter, draw a card.

name: Border of Life
text:
{key:Effect}
Effected card is {key:immortal} and {key:safe}. If the effected card perishes, you may attach Border of Life to another card you control. If you do not contol any cards, void Border of Life.

name: Mutation
Powder
text: {trigger:cast} Can only be cast during the opponent's turn: all front row cards gain {key:fragile} until the end of the turn.

name: Flock
text: {trigger:cast} Create up to 2 Crow {force:1} tokens and draw a card.

name: Honey Coating
text:
{key:Effect}

text:
{key:effect}
Effected card gains {force:1}. Gain {force:2} instead if the effected card is a bug.
skill: {skill:War Cry} Bugs you control gain {key:quick} until the end of the turn.

name: Bloodsong
text: {trigger:cast} Choose a number from 1-5: Deal damage equal to the number chosen to all cards in play.

name: Deeper Until The End
text:
{trigger:cast} Discard cards from the top of your deck up to the number of cards you control, then void Deeper Until the End. 
{trigger:begin} If Deeper Until the End is in your void: discard a card: return Deeper Until the End to your hand.

name: Skeleton Key
text: {trigger:cast} Sacrifice an active card you control: draw cards equal to its {force:?} (max 3).

name: Last Chance
Null and Creation
text:
{key:instant}
{trigger:cast} All cards your opponents control gain {key:doom} until the end of the turn. For every card affected, add {force:1} to a card you control.
skill: {skill:upside} If a card you control has {key:doom}, draw a card.

name: Fractal Blade
text:
{key:effect}
RITUAL: Can only be attached to a front row card. Can only be played once a turn.
Effected card gains {force:4} and {key:quick}.
{trigger:victor} Sacrifice the effected card, then return Fractal Blade to your hand.

name: Shatter
text:
{key:instant}
{trigger:cast} Target card is now {force:0} (does not cause the card to perish). Draw a card.

name: Last Wish
text: {trigger:enter} All players choose a card they control. Sacrifice any card not chosen. For the remaining cards, set their LVL to 1, then set both player's LVL to 1. Neither player can attack until the start of your next turn.
